description: Modèles CSP pour sites statiques Vercel (frame-ancestors + ressources communes).
frameAncestors: frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
etcbc: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://formsubmit.co https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'self' https://www.openstreetmap.org; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
quai: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://formsubmit.co; font-src 'self' data:; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
lamaison: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://npmcdn.com https://translate.google.com https://translate.googleapis.com https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://formsubmit.co https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app https://translate.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' https://www.google.com; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
rlreplay: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
bulletonsite: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.bunny.net; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://bulle-chatbot.vercel.app https://formsubmit.co https://s0.wp.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.bunny.net data:; frame-src https:; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://bulletonsite.com https://www.bulletonsite.com https://dariohd.github.io http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5174
